languages.original_text: "I doubt that the Sector Bionica will be able to meet the needs of everyone and anyone in the crew of an entire voidship. If that were the Rogue Trader's goal, we would have to dedicate half of another deck to such compartments."

languages.text: "Сомневаюсь, что Сектор Бионика сумеет покрыть потребности всех и каждого в составе экипажа целого пустотного судна. Если бы это было целью Вольного Торговца, подобных отсеков понадобилось бы еще на полпалубы".

"I doubt that the Sector Bionica will be able to meet the needs of everyone and anyone in the crew of an entire voidship. If that were the Rogue Trader's goal, we would have to dedicate half of another deck to such compartments."

"I doubt that the Sector Bionica will be able to meet the needs of everyone and anyone in the crew of an entire voidship. If that were the Rogue Trader's goal, we would have to dedicate half of another deck to such compartments."

languages.text: 「セクター・ビオニカが、空母全体の乗組員全員のニーズに応えられるとは思えません。もしそれがローグ・トレーダーの目標であれば、別のデッキの半分をそのような区画に充てる必要があったでしょう」
languages.original_text: "I doubt that the Sector Bionica will be able to meet the needs of everyone and anyone in the crew of an entire voidship. If that were the Rogue Trader's goal, we would have to dedicate half of another deck to such compartments."

traits.locale_text: 「セクター・ビオニカが、空母全体の乗組員全員のニーズに応えられるとは思えません。もしそれがローグ・トレーダーの目標であれば、別のデッキの半分をそのような区画に充てる必要があったでしょう。」

languages.text: « Je doute que le secteur Bionica soit capable de répondre aux besoins de tous les membres d'équipage d'un vaisseau entier. Si tel était l'objectif {mf|du libre-marchand|de la libre-marchande}, il nous faudrait la moitié d'un autre pont pour accueillir tous les compartiments nécessaires. »
languages.original_text: "I doubt that the Sector Bionica will be able to meet the needs of everyone and anyone in the crew of an entire voidship. If that were the Rogue Trader's goal, we would have to dedicate half of another deck to such compartments."

traits.locale_text: « Je doute que le secteur Bionica soit capable de répondre aux besoins de tous les membres d'équipage d'un vaisseau entier. Si tel était l'objectif {mf|du libre-marchand|de la libre-marchande}, il nous faudrait la moitié d'un autre pont pour accueillir tous les compartiments nécessaires. »

languages.text: "Ich bezweifle, dass der Sektor Bionica die Bedürfnisse jedes einzelnen Besatzungsmitglieds eines Raumschiffs stillen kann. Wäre das das Ziel {mf|des Freihändlers|der Freihändlerin}, müssten wir die Hälfte eines anderen Decks derartigen Abteilungen zuweisen."
languages.original_text: "I doubt that the Sector Bionica will be able to meet the needs of everyone and anyone in the crew of an entire voidship. If that were the Rogue Trader's goal, we would have to dedicate half of another deck to such compartments."

traits.locale_text: "Ich bezweifle, dass der Sektor Bionica die Bedürfnisse jedes einzelnen Besatzungsmitglieds eines Raumschiffs stillen kann. Wäre das das Ziel {mf|des Freihändlers|der Freihändlerin}, müssten wir die Hälfte eines anderen Decks derartigen Abteilungen zuweisen."

languages.text: "Sektör Biyonika'nın koca bir uçsuz gemisi mürettebatındaki herkesin ihtiyaçlarını karşılayabileceğinden şüpheliyim. Eğer Hür Tacir'in amacı bu olsaydı başka bir güvertenin yarısını bu tür bölmelere ayırmamız gerekirdi."
languages.original_text: "I doubt that the Sector Bionica will be able to meet the needs of everyone and anyone in the crew of an entire voidship. If that were the Rogue Trader's goal, we would have to dedicate half of another deck to such compartments."

traits.locale_text: "Sektör Biyonika'nın koca bir uçsuz gemisi mürettebatındaki herkesin ihtiyaçlarını karşılayabileceğinden şüpheliyim. Eğer Hür Tacir'in amacı bu olsaydı başka bir güvertenin yarısını bu tür bölmelere ayırmamız gerekirdi."

languages.text: «Dudo que el Sector Bionica baste para satisfacer las necesidades de todos los tripulantes de una nave del vacío. Si ese fuera el propósito {mf|del|de la} Comerciante Independiente, tendríamos que destinar otra media cubierta a instalar compartimentos similares».
languages.original_text: "I doubt that the Sector Bionica will be able to meet the needs of everyone and anyone in the crew of an entire voidship. If that were the Rogue Trader's goal, we would have to dedicate half of another deck to such compartments."

traits.locale_text: «Dudo que el Sector Bionica baste para satisfacer las necesidades de todos los tripulantes de una nave del vacío. Si ese fuera el propósito {mf|del|de la} Comerciante Independiente, tendríamos que destinar otra media cubierta a instalar compartimentos similares».

languages.text: “我不认为仿生区能够满足整艘虚空舰上所有船员的需求。若那真是行商浪人的目的，我们就得再腾出另外半层甲板建造这样的舱室。”
languages.original_text: "I doubt that the Sector Bionica will be able to meet the needs of everyone and anyone in the crew of an entire voidship. If that were the Rogue Trader's goal, we would have to dedicate half of another deck to such compartments."

traits.locale_text: “我不认为仿生区能够满足整艘虚空舰上所有船员的需求。若那真是行商浪人的目的，我们就得再腾出另外半层甲板建造这样的舱室。”
